title: Calibrated detection confidence
requirement_text: Detection confidences shall be calibrated via post-hoc temperature scaling; ECE shall be reported before and after.
acceptance_criteria: ECE before and after temperature scaling reported on kitti-val; calibrated ECE improves over uncalibrated, or any regression is documented with cause in docs/experiment_log.md.

title: Runtime OOD detection
requirement_text: The monitor shall compute a per-frame OOD score (energy-style; max-confidence baseline) flagging inputs outside the ODD.
acceptance_criteria: AUROC and FPR@95 reported for each OOD slice (BDD100K night/rain/fog + clear-day transfer control); energy-style score compared against max-confidence baseline on identical slices.

title: Degraded mode entry
requirement_text: The system shall enter DEGRADED on sustained monitor-score breach of the Q95 validation threshold (not single-frame spikes).
derived_from: SG-01; H-05; H-06; UCA-MON-01; UCA-MON-02; UCA-MON-04; CS-05
acceptance_criteria: State machine enters DEGRADED only after a sustained Q95 threshold breach; deterministic tests confirm a single-frame spike does not trigger the transition and a sustained breach always does.

title: Fail-safe request
requirement_text: The system shall issue FAIL_SAFE_REQUEST on sustained breach of the Q99 validation threshold or prolonged degraded condition.
acceptance_criteria: State machine issues FAIL_SAFE_REQUEST after a sustained Q99 breach or a prolonged DEGRADED condition; deterministic tests confirm both trigger paths and threshold provenance (validation data only).

title: Monitor logging
requirement_text: Per-frame monitor score, state, thresholds, and transitions shall be logged in machine-readable form.
acceptance_criteria: Every processed frame logs frame id, timestamp, backend, confidence summary, OOD score, active thresholds, state, transition reason, and latency; log completeness test passes over a full evaluation run.

title: Latency budget
requirement_text: Perception + monitor end-to-end latency shall satisfy the 40 ms budget at p95 on target hardware.
acceptance_criteria: Perception + monitor p95 latency < 40 ms on RTX 3050 Ti, measured over >=300 val images per backend; detector-only evidence (EXP-003/EXP-004) is partial until monitor overhead is included.
